intent: classify customer support tickets by urgency

task.raw_intent: classify customer support tickets by urgency
task.input_description: Customer support ticket text containing issue description, customer message, or inquiry
task.output_description: Urgency classification label (e.g., low, medium, high, or critical)
task.notes: Multi-class classification problem where class imbalance is likely (fewer critical/high urgency tickets). F1 score preferred over accuracy to account for imbalanced classes. May need to prioritize recall for high-urgency cases to avoid missing critical issues.

backbone.rationale: DistilBert is ideal for customer support ticket classification: it's 40% smaller and 60% faster than BERT while retaining 97% of its performance. For text classification with F1 optimization, it provides excellent accuracy-speed tradeoff. The uncased variant works well for support tickets which often have inconsistent capitalization.
